topics.title: 750 GeV Diphoton Excess
topics.question: Is the ~750 GeV diphoton excess observed by ATLAS and CMS at the LHC a new particle or a statistical fluctuation?
topics.resolution: Resolved when full Run 2 data (2016) confirms or excludes the excess at 5-sigma significance. If excess disappears with more data, H2 wins.

hypothesis_labels.H1: New particle — genuine resonance at ~750 GeV
hypothesis_labels.H2: Statistical fluctuation — disappears with more data
hypothesis_labels.H4: BSM physics but not a simple resonance (e.g., continuum, interference)

issues: CRITICAL: Near-zero uncertainty on ACTIVE topic — epistemic overconfidence. Time horizons and unresolved indicators contradict certainty.

top_queries.query: Evidence for: Either ATLAS or CMS reports >=5 sigma local significance for diphoton excess at ~750 GeV with full 2016 dataset
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 1 indicator — would trigger ALERT and major posterior shift

top_queries.query: Evidence for: Excess seen in a second decay channel (ZZ, Zh, WW) at ~750 GeV
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 2 indicator — would trigger ELEVATED

top_queries.query: Evidence for: Updated analysis shows narrow width consistent with single resonance
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 2 indicator — would trigger ELEVATED

top_queries.query: Evidence for: ATLAS and CMS report the excess at significantly different masses (>10 GeV apart) or one experiment sees it while the other does not at >2 sigma. Observable: comparison of fitted parameters in conference presentations or publications.
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 2 indicator — would trigger ELEVATED

topics.title: Strait of Hormuz Reopen Date
topics.question: By what date will the Strait of Hormuz reopen to normal traffic (≥80% of 2024-2025 baseline transit volume, sustained for ≥30 consecutive days, per Lloyd's List Intelligence + EIA tanker data)?
topics.resolution: First 30-day window where AIS-confirmed transit volume reaches ≥80% of baseline (mean of 2024 + 2025 daily transits per Lloyd's/EIA)

alerts.lead: Evidence base on calibration-hormuz-reopen-2027 is mostly stale (432/729 past TTL). Posterior is increasingly based on aged observations.
alerts.action: Run skills/triage.md on recent headlines to refresh the evidence base, or run skills/news-scan.md for a sweep.

top_queries.query: Evidence for: AIS-confirmed Hormuz transit reaches 40-55% of 2024-2025 baseline sustained 30 days in any window after May 2026 (precursor; resolution band starts at 80%, gap widened from prior 60% threshold). Source: Lloyd's List + EIA.
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 1 indicator — would trigger ALERT and major posterior shift

top_queries.query: Evidence for: AIS-confirmed Hormuz transit at 40-65% sustained 30 days WITHIN 2026-10-01 to 2027-03-31 window only. Source: Lloyd's / EIA.
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 1 indicator — would trigger ALERT and major posterior shift

top_queries.query: Evidence for: AIS-confirmed Hormuz transit at 40-75% sustained 30 days WITHIN 2027-04-01 to 2027-09-30 window only. Source: Lloyd's / EIA.
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 1 indicator — would trigger ALERT and major posterior shift

top_queries.query: Evidence against: Iran rial APPRECIATES >=15% sustained 60 days OR Iranian crude exports recover to >=2.0 mbpd sustained 90 days (genuine anti-H4: economic relief reduces regime incentive to maintain closure). Source: bonbast.com + Kpler.
top_queries.reason: Primary thesis at 87% — anti-indicator check prevents confirmation bias

top_queries.query: Evidence against: Announced bilateral framework agreement (per t1_bilateral_deal) is publicly repudiated, withdrawn, or violated within 60 days of signing OR negotiations explicitly break down per State/IRNA on-record statements (REV4: LR mass redistributed across H2/H3/H4 — collapsed deal more plausibly delays than implies indefinite closure). Source: State / IRNA / AP.
top_queries.reason: Primary thesis at 87% — anti-indicator check prevents confirmation bias

topics.title: LK-99: Room-Temperature Superconductor or Not?
topics.question: Is LK-99 (copper-substituted lead apatite) a room-temperature, ambient-pressure superconductor as claimed by Lee & Kim (2023)?
topics.resolution: Resolved when: (a) 3+ independent labs replicate zero-resistance AND diamagnetic levitation in LK-99 samples, OR (b) 3+ independent labs fail to replicate AND a credible structural/electronic explanation for the original observations emerges.

hypothesis_labels.H1: Genuine RTSC â€” LK-99 is a room-temp superconductor
hypothesis_labels.H2: Partial â€” real but not full SC (e.g., filamentary, diamagnetic, but not bulk SC)
hypothesis_labels.H3: Not SC â€” mundane explanation (impurities, measurement error, Cu2S)

issues: CRITICAL: Near-zero uncertainty on ACTIVE topic — epistemic overconfidence. Time horizons and unresolved indicators contradict certainty.
DRIFT-FLAGGED indicators (1) need regrounding before next firing: t2_cu2s_explanation

alerts.lead: Evidence base on calibration-lk99-superconductor is mostly stale (23/23 past TTL). Posterior is increasingly based on aged observations.
alerts.action: Run skills/triage.md on recent headlines to refresh the evidence base, or run skills/news-scan.md for a sweep.

top_queries.query: Evidence for: Independent lab measures zero resistance in LK-99 sample below critical temperature
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 1 indicator — would trigger ALERT and major posterior shift

top_queries.query: Evidence for: Independent lab confirms full Meissner effect (flux expulsion, not just partial levitation)
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 1 indicator — would trigger ALERT and major posterior shift

top_queries.query: Evidence for: 3+ independent labs fail to observe any SC signatures in high-quality samples
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 1 indicator — would trigger ALERT and major posterior shift

top_queries.query: Evidence for: Lab observes partial levitation or diamagnetic response but not full Meissner
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 2 indicator — would trigger ELEVATED

top_queries.query: Evidence for: Lab observes sharp resistivity drop but not zero resistance
top_queries.reason: Unfired Tier 2 indicator — would trigger ELEVATED
